title: RNA extraction from  Pichia pastoris
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"63ns6","text":"100 μL of  Pichia liquid culture","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bb8sv","text":"preferred RNA extraction Kit ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b8go3","text":"preferred clean and concentrator Kit ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1i5bm","text":"DNase ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d7k15","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: pipeting hole culture of Pichia liquid culture into 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes
centrifugation for 1 min at 10.000 x g
extract RNA with Kit: for e.g. ZymoResearch YeaStar RNA Kit (Cat.#R1002) following the manufacturers manual.
messure the concentration a A260/280 ratio of ~2.0 indicates pure RNA
To remove DNA contamination, treated samples with DNase use also a Clean and Concentrator Kit for e.g. the Zymoclean RNA Clean & Concentrator Kit (Cat.# R1013).
creator: Igem Dusseldorf
